name: PriorityQueue

aliases.name: PriorityQueue
aliases.comment: Persistant prirotiy queue. Constant time push and access to top.

values.name: empty
values.type: PriorityQueue a comparable

values.name: pop
values.comment: Remove the element with the top priority. Returns Nothing if input was empty
values.type: PriorityQueue a comparable -> Maybe (PriorityQueue a comparable)

values.name: push
values.type: comparable -> a -> PriorityQueue a comparable -> PriorityQueue a comparable

values.name: top
values.comment: Returns the value with the highest prority
values.type: PriorityQueue a comparable -> Maybe a

values.name: topPriority
values.comment: Returns the highest priority in the priority queue
values.type: PriorityQueue a comparable -> Maybe comparable

name: Container

aliases.name: Container
aliases.comment: A container allowing constant time dequeue operations and log time access

values.name: empty
values.type: Container a

values.name: fromList
values.comment: Make a container from a list
values.type: List a -> Container a

values.name: get
values.comment: Get the element at an index
values.type: Int -> Container a -> Maybe a

values.name: insert
values.comment: Insert an element at an index moving later elements to the right
values.type: Int -> a -> Container a -> Maybe (Container a)

values.name: peekBack
values.type: Container a -> Maybe a

values.name: peekFront
values.type: Container a -> Maybe a

values.name: popBack
values.type: Container a -> Container a

values.name: popFront
values.type: Container a -> Container a

values.name: pushBack
values.type: a -> Container a -> Container a

values.name: pushFront
values.type: a -> Container a -> Container a

values.name: remove
values.comment: Remove the element at an index mobing later elements to the left
values.type: Int -> Container a -> Maybe (Container a)

values.name: set
values.comment: Set the element at an index
values.type: Int -> a -> Container a -> Maybe (Container a)

values.name: size
values.comment: The number of elements in the collection
values.type: Container a -> Int

values.name: slice
values.comment:
Get a sub-section of an array: (slice start end array). The start is a zero-based index where we will start our slice.
The end is a zero-based index that indicates the end of the slice. The slice extracts up to but not including end.
values.type: Int -> Int -> Container a -> Container a

name: Annotated

aliases.name: AnnotatedFingerTree
aliases.comment: Finger tree annotated by a Monoid
aliases.type: { monoid : Monoid b, projection : a -> b, tree : InternalFingerTree a b }

aliases.name: Split
aliases.type: { left : AnnotatedFingerTree a b, middle : a, right : AnnotatedFingerTree a b }

values.name: after
values.type: (b -> Bool) -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b

values.name: annotate
values.type: AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> Split a b -> Split a b

values.name: before
values.type: (b -> Bool) -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b

values.name: concat
values.type: AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b

values.name: concatWithMiddle
values.comment: concatanate trees left and right with a list in between
values.type: AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> List a -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b

values.name: empty
values.comment: Empty finger tree specifiying monoid and projection
values.type: Monoid b -> (a -> b) -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b

values.name: from
values.comment: elements after and equal to when measure turns true
values.type: (b -> Bool) -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b

values.name: get
values.comment: get element when measure turns true
values.type: (b -> Bool) -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> Maybe a

values.name: insert
values.comment: insert element before measure turns true
values.type: (b -> Bool) -> a -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> Maybe (AnnotatedFingerTree a b)

values.name: leftPeek
values.type: AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> Maybe a

values.name: leftPop
values.type: AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b

values.name: leftPush
values.type: a -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b

values.name: reduce
values.type: AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> b

values.name: remove
values.comment: remove element when measure turns true
values.type: (b -> Bool) -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> Maybe (AnnotatedFingerTree a b)

values.name: rightPeek
values.type: AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> Maybe a

values.name: rightPop
values.type: AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b

values.name: rightPush
values.type: a -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b

values.name: set
values.comment: set element when measure turns true
values.type: (b -> Bool) -> a -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> Maybe (AnnotatedFingerTree a b)

values.name: split
values.type: (b -> Bool) -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> Maybe (Split a b)

values.name: upTo
values.comment: elements before and equal to when measure turns true
values.type: (b -> Bool) -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b -> AnnotatedFingerTree a b
